title: ShotStream: Streaming Multi-Shot Video Generation for Interactive Storytelling
reason: Turns multi-shot video generation into a low-latency streaming problem and makes interactive narrative control practical on a single GPU.

title: MuRF: Unlocking the Multi-Scale Potential of Vision Foundation Models
reason: A simple training-free multi-resolution fusion trick that upgrades frozen vision foundation models across tasks and model families.

title: PackForcing: Short Video Training Suffices for Long Video Sampling and Long Context Inference
reason: Pushes long-video diffusion much further with bounded KV-cache growth and large temporal extrapolation from short-video supervision.

title: Vega: Learning to Drive with Natural Language Instructions
reason: Combines language-conditioned world modeling and planning for personalized autonomous driving with a sizable new instruction dataset.

title: Agent Factories for High Level Synthesis: How Far Can General-Purpose Coding Agents Go in Hardware Optimization?
reason: Shows coordinated general-purpose coding agents can deliver large hardware-design speedups without hardware-specific training.

title: PSDesigner: Automated Graphic Design with a Human-Like Creative Workflow
reason: Moves beyond image generation into editable PSD-level automation by teaching models a more human design workflow.

title: MegaFlow: Zero-Shot Large Displacement Optical Flow
reason: Uses pretrained global vision priors to get strong zero-shot large-displacement motion estimation without heavy task-specific tuning.

title: Training the Knowledge Base through Evidence Distillation and Write-Back Enrichment
reason: Treats the RAG corpus itself as a trainable component and improves retrieval quality by writing distilled evidence back into the index.

title: R-C2: Cycle-Consistent Reinforcement Learning Improves Multimodal Reasoning
reason: Uses cycle-consistent RL as a dense alignment signal to improve multimodal reasoning without extra labels.

title: Natural-Language Agent Harnesses
reason: Externalizes agent harness logic into portable natural-language artifacts, making controller design easier to transfer and study.
